name: Jackie
description: A single round of a 1000m row, 50 thrusters, and 30 pull-ups — a rowing-led triplet that front-loads a long aerobic piece before the barbell and gymnastics work.
source_notes: crossfit.com/faq/wod (official CrossFit FAQ, 'Explain The Workouts with Names (the Girls)?'), retrieved 2026-07-08
